versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   penpot-0-28-0                   true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: penpot
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: penpot-0-28-0
      name: penpot
      namespace: penpot
      values: |
        penpot:
          global:
            postgresqlEnabled: true
            valkeyEnabled: true
          persistence:
            assets:
              enabled: true
